message:
feat(rch): improve state locking and transfer reliability

state/lock.rs:
- Extended lock management capabilities
- Better handling of concurrent operations

transfer.rs:
- Enhanced file transfer robustness
- Improved error recovery during transfers

status_display.rs, status_types.rs:
- Status reporting improvements
